variants: The bandits exchange a sharp look. "You don't get to just walk past us," one snarls — and they draw steel.
"Oi! Where d'you think you're going?" Both bandits step onto the bridge, weapons rising.
A blade slides from its scabbard. "We warned you. Now we take it the hard way."
The lead bandit spits over the rail. "Cheap bastard. Have it your way then." They move to intercept.
